Class Order.Identity

java.lang.Object
recoder.util.Order.Identity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Equality, HashCode, Order
Enclosing interface:
Order
public static class Order.Identity extends Object implements Order, HashCode
Identity order implementation comparing objects by address. The implementation uses System.identityHashCode and implements HashCode. The order is based upon this encoding which allows retrieval of objects but has no further meaning. Note that x != null implies less(null, x) and of course equals(null, null).

    • less

      public final boolean less(Object x, Object y)
      compares the given objects using there identity hash code
      Specified by:
      less in interface Order
      Parameters:
      x - the first object.
      y - the second object.
      Returns:
      true if the identity hash code of the first object is less than that of the second object
